results.rendered_html:
aiḍa (von iḍā)
1〉 adj.
a〉 Labung —, Stärkung enthaltend  VS. 15,7 .
— b〉 das Wort iḍā enthaltend gaṇa vimuktādi zu  P. 5,2,61 . Als n. N. eines Sāman  VS. 13,57 .
— 2〉 m. der Sohn der Iḍā; so heisst Purūravas  ṚV. 10,95,18 .  ŚAT. BR. 11,1,5,1 . Vgl. aila.

aiḍa 1〉b〉  KĀṬH. 34,6 .  PAÑCAV. BR. 7,3,5 . 6,17 .  ŚĀṄKH. BR. 29,3 . aiḍamāyasyam, aiḍaṃ māṇḍavam N. verschiedener Sāman  Ind. St. 3,211,a. 229,a . Vgl. svāraiḍaukṣṇorandhra.

results.rendered_html:
aiḍa a. Ved. [iḍā-aṇ]
1 Containing anything refreshing.
2 Containing the word (iḍā) (such as a chapter).
3 Belonging to a sheep.
— ḍaḥ N. of Purūravas (iḍāyāḥ apatyaṃ).
